reason_not_scored: This video is an instructional/product demonstration video by Inovus Medical. It features Dr. Elliot Street (Co-Founder & CEO) presenting and demonstrating the Inovus Medical training platform and its components (Johan grasping forceps, Bozzini light source, 5mm ports, camera system, etc.). The content includes equipment setup, feature highlights, and hands-on demonstration of the trainer hardware with endoscopic views of the internal training chamber. There is no actual FLS task performance by a trainee attempting timed surgical skill execution.
